ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (M/F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of customer registration */,
  "loyalty_program_status" TEXT /* Status in the loyalty program (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_importance" TEXT /* Importance level of the product (high/medium/low) */,
  "weight_in_gms" INTEGER /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  "cost_of_product" REAL /* Cost of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_importance FOREIGN KEY ("product_importance") REFERENCES product_ratings ("rating")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "prior_purchases" INTEGER /* Number of prior purchases made by the customer */,
  "purchase_amount" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer in the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used by the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase being shipped */,
  "mode_of_shipment" TEXT /* Mode of shipment (ship/flight) */,
  "warehouse_block" TEXT /* Warehouse block where the shipment is located */,
  "discount_offered" INTEGER /* Discount offered to the customer */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date of shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (pending/in-transit/delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_mode_of_shipment FOREIGN KEY ("mode_of_shipment") REFERENCES shipping_modes ("mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_warehouse_block FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_block") REFERENCES warehouse ("warehouse_block")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_care" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer care call */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the call */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date of the call */,
  "customer_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "call_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the customer care call */,
  "call_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the customer care call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_care_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_block" TEXT /* Block where the warehouse is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode (ship/flight) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping mode */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping mode */,
  "delivery_time" INTEGER /* Delivery time for the shipping mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the product (1-5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the product rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "program_rewards" TEXT /* Rewards offered by the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the loyalty program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer in the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "program_id")
)
column_names: Weight of the product in grams
ID of the customer who made the purchase
Number of prior purchases made by the customer
Total amount spent by the customer in the purchase
